data.name: SEX HELL 👹
data.detailed_description:
A first-person shooter with a hellish theme.
The player will have to fight his way through crowds of enemies and exterminate the various devils of hell.
Advancing through the levels we meet new enemies and a variety of weapons.
On each level, you have to fight with the boss to get a variety of adult scenes.

Features:
  • Gunplay with monsters
  • Lots of weapons to choose
  • Hot scenes to unlock

data.short_description: SEX HELL 👹 is a first-person shooter arena in the horror style. While playing on each level you have to fight with the boss to get a variety of adult scenes

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or above
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
